mapper.select: SELECT 'qualificationCertificationAssessment' AS title ,'/QualificationCertificationAssessment' AS route ,'qualificationCertificationAssessmentDesc' AS description , case when qualificationCertificationAssessment.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_qualification_certification tqc WHERE tqc.comp_id = #{compId} AND tqc.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS qualificationCertificationAssessment UNION ALL SELECT 'safetyDutiesDesigDocument' AS title ,'/SafetyDutiesDesigDocument' AS route ,'safetyDutiesDesigDocumentDesc' AS description , case when safetyDutiesDesigDocument.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc tsdd WHERE tsdd.comp_id = #{compId} AND tsdd.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS safetyDutiesDesigDocument UNION ALL SELECT 'sAndHQualificationCertRegister' AS title ,'/SAndHQualificationCertRegister' AS route ,'sAndHQualificationCertRegisterDesc' AS description , case when sAndHQualificationCertRegister.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg tqcr WHERE tqcr.comp_id = #{compId} AND tqcr.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS sAndHQualificationCertRegister
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_qualification_certification_doc
INSERT INTO esg.tb_qualification_certification_doc ( doc_seq, comp_id, target_column, ord_seq, content, point, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{targetColumn}, #{ordSeq}, #{content}, #{point}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_qualification_certification_doc SET ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, content = #{content}, point = #{point}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE doc_seq = #{docSeq}
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_qualification_certification where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_qualification_certification ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, write_date, writer_id, hr_id, hr_type, pass_yn, column1, column2, column3, column4, column5, column_etc1, column_etc2, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{writeDate}, #{writerId}, #{hrId}, #{hrType}, #{passYn}, #{column1}, #{column2}, #{column3}, #{column4}, #{column5}, #{columnEtc1}, #{columnEtc2}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_qualification_certification SET hr_id=#{hrId}, hr_type=#{hrType}, pass_yn=#{passYn}, column1=#{column1}, column2=#{column2}, column3=#{column3}, column4=#{column4}, column5=#{column5}, column_etc1=#{columnEtc1}, column_etc2=#{columnEtc2}, remark=#{remark}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.delete: UPDATE esg.tb_qualification_certification SET use_yn='N', updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.select: select tqc.* ,thi.*,sf.file_id as logoId, thiw.hr_nm as writer_nm , esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('QCA', tqc.write_year || tqc.doc_no) as approvalStatus from esg.tb_qualification_certification tqc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi on tqc.hr_id = thi.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info thiw on thiw.hr_id = tqc.writer_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = thi.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' WHERE tqc.comp_id = #{compId} and tqc.write_year = #{writeYear} order by tqc.use_yn desc, tqc.doc_no desc

select tqc.*,thi.hr_nm, thi.working_at, jbrp.jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm as orgn_nm, thiw.hr_nm as writer_nm, toiw.orgn_nm as writer_orgn from esg.tb_qualification_certification tqc left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = tqc.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info thiw on thiw.hr_id = tqc.writer_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = thi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toiw on toiw.orgn_id = thiw.orgn_id WHERE tqc.comp_id = #{compId} AND tqc.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tqc.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tqc.doc_type= #{docType}

SELECT a.*, b.item_type FROM esg.tb_qualification_certification_evaluation_criteria a LEFT JOIN dataset.tb_dataset_qualification_certification_evaluation_item b ON a.item_id = b.item_id WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId}
SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_dataset_qualification_certification_evaluation_criteria WHERE item_id = #{searchText} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{criteriaId} is not null and #{criteriaId} != '' then #{criteriaId} ELSE TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(criteria_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') END AS criteria_id FROM esg.tb_qualification_certification_evaluation_criteria WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND criteria_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_qualification_certification_evaluation_criteria ( comp_id, item_id, criteria_id, criteria_nm, point, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{itemId}, #{criteriaId}, #{criteriaNm}, #{point}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
